sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108741" key="u(polwpa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπολωπάω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">70</biblScope></bibl>, where <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Κύκλωψ</foreign> is called <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ τοὺς λογισμοὺς ὑπολωπῶν</foreign> (<sense id="n108741.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑποσυλῶν</ref> </xr>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑποκλωπῶν</foreign> cj. Hase).</sense> </entryFree>
